definitions: To soar or glide in the air without flapping the wings.
To move or cause to move in a way that resembles a kite.
To write or pass (a bad check or other fraudulent commercial paper).
To raise money by issuing or negotiating bad checks or other fraudulent commercial paper.
examples: The hawk began to kite above the fields.
He would kite checks to cover his gambling debts.
The children kited their homemade crafts.
She learned to kite surf on her vacation.
